case_title: DELFINO SUAREZ VS. JOSE ALVARO ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUAREZ, DELFINO AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JOSE ALVARO AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUAREZ, DELFINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JOSE ALVARO AN INDIVIDUAL $3,728.13 PRINCIPAL, $6.15 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,959.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
